title: Micle's Login Protection
description: Protects joining and afk players on your server from harm!
body:
![Banner artwork.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/419cc6b0ca28594cb0505be2d4b4bd439ed3817d.jpeg)

A configurable server and client sided protection mod for joining and afk players. Client side allows for configuring specific allowed actions that a player can perform without being marked as joined or not afk.

# FAQ

<details>
<summary>Can I use this in my modpack?</summary>
Yes, go for it! Just make sure to use the appropriate source for your modpack (Modrinth/CurseForge).
</details>

<details>
<summary>Will this be ported to x.x.x version?</summary>
Feel free to open up a version port request on my issue tracker and I will see what I can do.
</details>
